prompt: Create a dramatic square-format anime portrait of a mysterious young woman in a pitch-black void, shown from the chest up in a three-quarter pose facing right while looking slightly back toward the viewer. She has long flowing platinum blonde hair with heavy bangs, glossy strands, and a glowing rim-lit section down the left side. She wears a wide-brimmed dark hat with oversized rabbit-ear-like extensions or sharp folded panels, plus a dark floral-patterned outfit with large pale teal flowers and soft pink accents. Use extreme low-key lighting: most of the image is swallowed by black shadow, with intense cyan-blue backlight from the left, subtle magenta-pink illumination on the face and lips, and small sharp highlights on the eyes, hair, hat edge, shoulder, and fabric. The expression should be calm, distant, and slightly melancholic, with parted lips and large detailed eyes. Add one small cyan triangular shard of light floating in the darkness to the right of her face. Style the image as polished high-contrast Japanese anime key art with painterly digital brushwork, cinematic noir lighting, luminous edge glow, deep shadows, soft bloom, elegant composition, and no visible text or watermark.
promptEn: Create a dramatic square-format anime portrait of a mysterious young woman in a pitch-black void, shown from the chest up in a three-quarter pose facing right while looking slightly back toward the viewer. She has long flowing platinum blonde hair with heavy bangs, glossy strands, and a glowing rim-lit section down the left side. She wears a wide-brimmed dark hat with oversized rabbit-ear-like extensions or sharp folded panels, plus a dark floral-patterned outfit with large pale teal flowers and soft pink accents. Use extreme low-key lighting: most of the image is swallowed by black shadow, with intense cyan-blue backlight from the left, subtle magenta-pink illumination on the face and lips, and small sharp highlights on the eyes, hair, hat edge, shoulder, and fabric. The expression should be calm, distant, and slightly melancholic, with parted lips and large detailed eyes. Add one small cyan triangular shard of light floating in the darkness to the right of her face. Style the image as polished high-contrast Japanese anime key art with painterly digital brushwork, cinematic noir lighting, luminous edge glow, deep shadows, soft bloom, elegant composition, and no visible text or watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张正方形构图的戏剧性动漫肖像，主角是 一位神秘的年轻女性，背景为漆黑的虚空。画面采用半身像，呈四分之三侧面朝向右侧，同时微微回头看向观众。她留着飘逸的 铂金色 长发，带有厚重的刘海、光泽的发丝，左侧有一道发光的轮廓光。她戴着一顶宽檐深色帽子，帽子上有类似兔耳的超大延伸部分或锋利的折叠面板，身穿深色花卉图案服装，配有大朵淡青色花卉和柔和的粉色点缀。采用极端的低调照明：大部分画面被黑色阴影吞没，左侧有强烈的青蓝色背光，面部和嘴唇上有微妙的洋红色光照，眼睛、头发、帽檐、肩膀和织物上有细小而锐利的高光。表情应保持冷静、疏离且略带忧郁，双唇微张，眼睛大而精致。在她的脸部右侧黑暗中添加一个漂浮的小型青色三角形光碎片。风格设定为精致的高对比度日本动漫关键视觉图，结合绘画感的数字笔触、电影级黑色电影灯光、发光的边缘光、深邃的阴影、柔和的辉光、优雅的构图，且画面中不包含任何可见文字或水印。
